item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Oil Depot, Port in Massive Drone Attack on Russia
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck an oil depot in Krasnodar Krai and targeted port facilities overnight, marking one of the largest drone operations of the war.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Output Hits Decades-Low as US Blockade Squeezes Iran
item.description: OPEC crude production fell to its lowest level in decades as the US maritime blockade of Iran disrupts exports, tightening global supply.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iran Dodges US Blockade Through Iraq as New Smuggling Route Emerges
item.description: More than 50 days after the US-led maritime blockade, Iraq's Umm Qasr port has become a key smuggling route for Iran to circumvent sanctions.

item.title: ⚠️ Iran Launches Missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain, US Military Says
item.description: Iran launched 7 missiles targeting US military bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, marking a significant escalation as Gulf states intercept incoming attacks.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Visits Polarized Spain With Focus on Migration
item.description: Pope Leo XIV arrived in Spain for a visit focused on immigration and social justice at a politically turbulent time for the country.

item.title: ⚔️ US and Iran Exchange Strikes in Gulf as Ceasefire Efforts Stall
item.description: US forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites after shooting down drones near the Strait of Hormuz, while Iran targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain in a new escalation complicating peace efforts.

item.title: 📈 UAE Stock Markets Rally Despite Stalled US-Iran Peace Talks
item.description: Dubai markets outperformed regional peers on Friday, with investors appearing to brush aside fading hopes for a diplomatic breakthrough in the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Invests $162 Million in AI to Promote Xi Jinping Ideology
item.description: Xinhuanet plans to invest over 1.1 billion yuan on an authoritative AI agent to help promote President Xi Jinping political thinking, according to Shanghai Stock Exchange filings.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Strikes Iranian Radar Sites After Drone Launches Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Qeshm Island after shooting down drones launched by Iran toward the Strait of Hormuz, CENTCOM said. The escalation complicates ongoing diplomatic efforts to end the conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and Russia Exchange 185 Prisoners Each in Latest POW Swap
item.description: Ukraine and Russia each exchanged 185 service personnel in the latest prisoner of war swap on Friday, officials in both countries said, continuing the pattern of periodic exchanges despite the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's Xi Jinping to Visit North Korea in First Trip in Nearly 7 Years
item.description: China announced President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on a two-day trip from June 8, his first in nearly seven years, as Beijing seeks to reassert ties with Pyongyang, its only formal treaty ally.

item.title: ⚽ Iran World Cup Players Granted US Visas Despite Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Iran's World Cup soccer players have been granted visas to enter the United States, a White House official confirmed, just 10 days before their first match in Los Angeles amid the ongoing conflict between the two countries.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Aoun Thanks Saudi Crown Prince for Support
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun spoke by phone with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, thanking him for Saudi support to Beirut amid ongoing regional tensions and humanitarian crisis.

item.title: 🇯🇵 UNESCO Body Recommends Japan Ancient Sites for Heritage List
item.description: A UNESCO advisory body has recommended adding the Asuka-Fujiwara ancient sites in Nara Prefecture to the World Heritage list, highlighting Japan historical heritage recognition.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️💀 Russian drone strikes kill four at Kyiv dairy factory
item.description: A Russian drone attack on a dairy factory in the Kyiv region killed four people and injured seven others, Ukrainian officials reported.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚛️ US preparing IAEA resolution condemning Iran
item.description: The United States is drafting a resolution to condemn Iran ahead of next week's IAEA Board of Governors meeting, a move that could complicate ongoing US-Iran talks as the conflict nears 100 days.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇴💥 Ukrainian drone damages Romanian Black Sea port terminal
item.description: A Ukrainian maritime drone self-detonated near an oil terminal in Romania's Constanta port after Russia jammed the vessel, causing it to drift off course. No casualties reported.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦⚠️ Ukrainian drone injures engineers at Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
item.description: Russia's Rosatom said a Ukrainian drone deliberately struck engineers demining areas around the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power station, injuring at least three people.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇺🇸😤 Trump's 'crazy' rebuke undercuts Netanyahu at critical moment
item.description: Trump's public criticism of Netanyahu as 'crazy' has undercut the Israeli leader at a delicate moment, highlighting tensions despite Netanyahu's portrayal of being uniquely adept at dealing with the US president.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices fall on mounting hopes for US-Iran de-escalation
item.description: Crude prices dropped as traders gained confidence that renewed conflict between the US and Iran was becoming less likely, with peace negotiations showing signs of progress.

item.title: ⚓ US forces board sanctioned tanker in Indian Ocean
item.description: The US military conducted an interdiction of a stateless oil tanker in the Indian Ocean overnight, continuing enforcement of sanctions amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump vows quick end to Iran war in Wisconsin campaign stop
item.description: President Trump promised to swiftly end the Iran conflict and remove a source of high prices while campaigning for Republicans in rural Wisconsin ahead of midterm elections.

item.title: 🚀 SpaceX IPO draws $150 billion in demand, twice the offering size
item.description: Investor demand for SpaceX's $75 billion IPO has reached approximately $150 billion, making it roughly two times oversubscribed ahead of the highly anticipated market debut.

item.title: ☁️ SpaceX locks in Google cloud deal ahead of IPO
item.description: SpaceX signed a multi-year cloud services agreement with Google for computing capacity, securing additional revenue streams ahead of its stock market debut next week.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇰🇼 US Approves $1.98 Billion Counter-Drone System Sale to Kuwait
item.description: The US State Department approved a major sale of counter-unmanned aerial systems to Kuwait as Gulf states ramp up air defenses amid regional tensions.
